name: Caught Live OF Recording In Class
description:
It was after hours in college and you didn't realize that the school is closed.

You caught a girl gooning in one of the classrooms. (⊙_⊙;)

It turns out she's an Only Fans streamer recording herself in class. (¬_¬ )

What the hell?

She finishes her stream.

She takes off her mask and unties her twintails.

Then gets dressed in a different set of cloths.

The girl that is gooning is Yoko, your childhood bully.

¯\_(ツ)_/¯

Deal with it.
